items.title: I have a 5-tier metal storage shelf like this in my basement, grab one for yours down at $46.50
items.summary:
GarveeHome 5-Tier Metal Storage Shelf

Buy for $46.50 (Reg. $55.50)

What we love

I have a unit like this in my basement and use it to store tech boxes, protein powder, and more. It’s really a catch-all for stuff that I need to hold on to, but don’t really have a dedicated spot for quite yet. This unit can hold up to “2,000 pounds” and stands 5 feet tall. I like that it can be split into two shorter shelves as well.
